[Applicant Name]  
Lily Chen  
[Date]  
[Your Address]  
[City, State, ZIP Code]  
[Email Address]  
[Phone Number]  

[Company Name]  
[Company Address]  
[City, State, ZIP Code]  

Dear Hiring Manager,

I am writing to express my interest in the position of Business Development Manager, as advertised. With a deep passion for identifying new business opportunities, I am eager to leverage my skills and experience to contribute to the growth of your esteemed team's Business Development department.

As a dedicated and results-driven professional, I have honed my abilities in strategizing and executing business objectives that drive organization success. My enthusiasm for fostering sustainable growth aligns perfectly with the values and objectives of your company. I am particularly drawn to this opportunity as it is aligned with my career goals and offers an excellent platform to utilize my skills.

Furthermore, my experience has equipped me with the essential skills required for this role, including effective communication, strategic planning, and the ability to work collaboratively within dynamic teams. I believe that these skills will allow me to not only meet but exceed the expectations placed upon the Business Development Manager position.

I am excited about the possibility of contributing to [Company Name] and am confident that I can bring fresh perspectives and innovative ideas to your Business Development department. Thank you for considering my application. I look forward to the opportunity to discuss how I can contribute to your team.

Warm regards,

Lily Chen

goldAnswers.Cover Letter: I am enthusiastic about identifying new business opportunities and am eager to contribute to the Business Development team's growth.
